name: classone-booking-api
description: Class One booking system API for Neon PostgreSQL and Vercel.

scripts.check: node --check api/health.js && node --check api/state.js && node --check api/state-version.js && node --check api/state-chunk.js && node --check api/teacher-view.js && node --check api/teacher-version.js && node --check api/teacher-students.js && node --check api/teacher-incentive-claim.js && node --check api/audit.js && node --check lib/booking-resolution.js && node --check lib/calendar-resolver.js && node --check lib/db.js && node --check lib/http.js && node -e "require.resolve('./lib/booking-resolution.js')" && node -e "require.resolve('./lib/calendar-resolver.js')" && npm test
